Class SinglePlayerViewManager

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.controller.manager.SinglePlayerViewManager
public class SinglePlayerViewManager extends Object
Manages single player view operations and UI state transitions. Handles refreshing bricks, game background, next bricks, hold brick, and visibility logic.

  • Constructor Summary

    • SinglePlayerViewManager

      public SinglePlayerViewManager(GameStateManager gameStateManager, PanelCoordinator panelCoordinator)

  • Method Details

    • setSinglePlayerScreen

      public void setSinglePlayerScreen(SinglePlayerScreen singlePlayerScreen)

    • refreshBrick

      public void refreshBrick(ViewData brick)
      Refreshes the brick display. Handles gameStarted condition - doesn't show brick if game hasn't started.
      Parameters:
      brick - The brick data to display

    • refreshGameBackground

      public void refreshGameBackground(int[][] board)
      Refreshes the game background display.
      Parameters:
      board - The board matrix to display

    • updateNextBricks

      public void updateNextBricks(List<Brick> nextBricks)
      Updates the next bricks display. Handles visibility logic - only shows next bricks when game has started.
      Parameters:
      nextBricks - The list of next bricks to display

    • updateHoldBrick

      public void updateHoldBrick(Brick heldBrick)
      Updates the hold brick display.
      Parameters:
      heldBrick - The brick being held (can be null)

    • getCurrentBrickData

      public ViewData getCurrentBrickData()
      Gets the current brick data from the screen.
      Returns:
      The current brick data

    • setCurrentBrickData

      public void setCurrentBrickData(ViewData brickData)
      Sets the current brick data on the screen.
      Parameters:
      brickData - The brick data to store

    • setEventListener

      public void setEventListener(InputEventListener eventListener)
      Sets the event listener for the single player screen.
      Parameters:
      eventListener - The event listener
